# scalegrid_alert_rule (Resource)

Manages an alert rule on a ScaleGrid cluster. Alert rules are immutable; changing any attribute replaces the rule.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Alert when free disk drops below 10%.
resource "scalegrid_alert_rule" "low_disk" {
  database      = "mongodb"
  cluster_id    = scalegrid_cluster.mongo.id
  type          = "DISK_FREE"
  operator      = "LT"
  threshold     = "10.0"
  notifications = ["EMAIL"]
}

# Metric-based alert with a duration window.
resource "scalegrid_alert_rule" "high_cpu" {
  database      = "mongodb"
  cluster_id    = scalegrid_cluster.mongo.id
  type          = "METRIC"
  metric        = "CPU_USAGE"
  operator      = "GT"
  threshold     = "85.0"
  duration      = "SIX"
  notifications = ["EMAIL", "PAGERDUTY"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the cluster the rule applies to.
- `database` (String) Database engine: `mongodb`, `redis`, `mysql`, or `postgresql`.
- `notifications` (List of String) Notification channels: `EMAIL`, `SMS`, `PAGERDUTY`, `SLACK`, `OPSGENIE`, or `XMATTERS`.
- `operator` (String) Comparison operator: `EQ`, `LT`, `GT`, `LTE`, or `GTE`.
- `threshold` (String) Threshold value paired with the operator (e.g. `10.0`).
- `type` (String) Alert rule type: `METRIC`, `USER`, `BILLING`, `BACKUP`, `DISK_FREE`, or `ROLE_CHANGE`.

### Optional

- `duration` (String) Duration the condition must hold: `TWO`, `SIX`, `HOURLY`, or `DAILY`.
- `metric` (String) Metric name (required when type is METRIC). See ScaleGrid docs for valid metrics per engine.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the alert rule.
